nasb.text: It happened at that time as Eli was lying down in his place (now his eyesight had begun to grow dim and he could not see well),

esv.text: At that time Eli, whose eyesight had begun to grow dim so that he could not see, was lying down in his own place.

cnv.text: 有一天，以利躺臥在自己的地方，他的眼睛早已昏花，不能看得清楚了。

ccb.text: 一天晚上，老眼昏花的以利正睡在自己的房里。
